## Analyzers (1)

### NERD `v1.1`
Get Reputation score and other basic information from Network Entity Reputation Database (NERD)

- **Author:** Vaclav Bartos, CESNET
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/NERD/nerd.json)
